title: Nuclear/EMP Event — First Hour
description: The first hour after a nuclear detonation or EMP event is the most critical. Execute in order.

steps.title: Immediate Shelter
steps.summary: Get inside the most substantial structure available

steps.title: Contamination Control
steps.summary: If you were outside at time of event: decontaminate
checklistItems: Outer clothing removed and bagged outside

steps.title: Electronics Assessment (EMP)
checklistItems: Vehicle started (older vehicles more likely to survive)

steps.title: Water Security
checklistItems: Running tap water OFF (may be contaminated)
Radiation-contaminated water sources identified (do not use)

steps.title: Radiation Monitoring Basics
steps.summary: Monitor radiation levels if equipment available
checklistItems: Stay inside minimum 24 hours (radiation decays rapidly)
Monitor NOAA emergency broadcast if radio works

steps.title: Rationing and Planning
checklistItems: Exit plan for after 24-hour shelter period
